about.intro: Gamma Neutral was founded on a simple observation: too many organizations invest in data and Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology without the engineering discipline to make it work. Our team brings hands-on experience from financial services, government, and healthcare technology programs — and we built this firm to deliver the focused, senior-level attention that large consultancies cannot.

pointOfView.title: Our Point of View
pointOfView.content: We believe that the gap between a promising AI prototype and a production-ready system is where most data initiatives fail. Gamma Neutral exists to close that gap — with rigorous engineering, pragmatic architecture decisions, and a commitment to solutions your team can actually maintain after we leave.

values.partnershipDesc: Your team succeeds after we leave

companyOverview.title: Engineering discipline for data and AI
companyOverview.description: {company} is a Toronto-based consulting firm focused on Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems, data engineering, and cloud architecture. We work with financial institutions, healthcare organizations, and government agencies to design, build, and deploy data solutions that deliver measurable outcomes in production.

howWeWork.title: How We Work
howWeWork.subtitle: A structured, transparent process designed to deliver production-ready solutions

discoveryWorkshops.title: Discovery Workshops
discoveryWorkshops.description: Structured sessions that produce clear problem definitions, stakeholder alignment, and a prioritized roadmap — not just meeting notes.

architectureDecisions.title: Architecture Decision Records
architectureDecisions.description: Every significant technical decision is documented with context, alternatives considered, and rationale — so your team understands the "why" long after we leave.

iterativeDelivery.title: Iterative Delivery
iterativeDelivery.description: Bi-weekly demos with working software. No disappearing for months — you see progress and can course-correct in real time.

knowledgeTransfer.title: Knowledge Transfer
knowledgeTransfer.description: Documentation and training are deliverables, not afterthoughts. Your team should be able to maintain and extend every system we build.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.subtitle: Hands-on expertise in data engineering, AI, and cloud architecture

growingTeam.title: A Growing Team
growingTeam.description: Gamma Neutral brings together experienced consultants for each engagement. Our network includes specialists in data engineering, ML operations, cloud architecture, and cybersecurity — assembled based on the specific needs of your project.
